description_long: This is a single-story residential house with a spacious, open floor plan and a large covered front porch supported by columns. The house features multiple rooms, including a living area, kitchen, bedrooms, and bathrooms, all arranged around a central hallway. Large windows line the exterior walls, allowing for ample natural light and views of the surrounding area. The roof is a combination of a prominent gable over the porch and a flat or low-pitched section over the main living spaces. The exterior walls are primarily white, with accents of blue and gray, and the porch area is finished with wood or wood-like materials. The house is surrounded by narrow green strips, possibly representing small yards or garden spaces.
description: A single-story house with a large covered front porch, multiple rooms, and large windows, featuring a gable roof and white exterior walls with blue accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch with columns, main entry steps, and large windows along the facade.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extended living area, large glass windows, and the depth of the house layout.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back rooms, smaller windows, and the narrow green yard areas on both sides.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the dining area, kitchen, and additional access to the porch.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a covered porch with steps, columns, and a prominent overhang.
